ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain platform where the transaction occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "price_in_eth" REAL /* Price of the transaction in Ethereum */,
  "price_in_wei" INTEGER /* Price of the transaction in Wei */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Sender's address */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Recipient's address */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number where the transaction was confirmed */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Amount of gas used by the transaction */,
  "gas_price_in_wei" INTEGER /* Gas price of the transaction in Wei */,
  "nonce" INTEGER /* Nonce of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "blockchain_transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID on the blockchain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_address FOREIGN KEY ("from_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address FOREIGN KEY ("to_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchains" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain platform */,
  "blockchain_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain platform */,
  "blockchain_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the blockchain */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Network of the blockchain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "transaction_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address on the blockchain */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of address */,
  "address_label" TEXT /* Label for the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the metadata */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_group" TEXT /* Group of metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_metadata_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the transaction data */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user when accessing the transaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
